title: Keple Nails for Wood Flat Round Head 40mm (Pack of 250) Zinc Plated Nail Galvanized Heavy Duty for DIY and Crafts Home Decor Woodwork Furniture Hanging Pictures Construction (40mm x 2mm)
features: COMMON NAILS – Wall Nails are used for general construction and specifically for framing and other structural work. The head is designed to accept the pointed tip of a nail set, making it easier to countersunk the nail without slipping and gouging the wood.

ADVANTAGES -Their thickness makes them strong but also more likely to split wood than when compared to thinner nails. Some carpenters actually dull the nail tip to prevent splitting the wood, though to do so means the tip will tear the wood fibers, thereby slightly reducing the holding power.
ZINC PLATED - Galvanised steel hanging nails are coated with a zinc-based product. The zinc coating adds extra protection and durability, as well as preventing rust from forming for a long time.

UNIVERSAL USE - They are most commonly used with 2x dimensional lumber in interior or exterior applications trim boards and for nailing door frames and trim. Ideal for various wooden woodworking projects for general repairs and perfect in home decoration, crafts such as: Hanging pictures, Wall art and String art.
INSTALLATION - Use a power tool or a hammer. Size: Diameter of nail - 2 mm. Length - 40 mm. Pack of 250 pcs.
description: From the brand Previous page At Keple, our mission is to make your life simpler and more enjoyable. We achieve this through our exceptional range of products and services, designed with excellence in mind. Integrity and innovation are at the heart of everything we do. We are committed to ethical practices and contributing positively to our community.
